---
timeout-minutes: 5
strict: true
on:
  issues:
    types: [opened, reopened, edited]
  issue_comment:
    types: [created]
if: ${{ !github.event.issue.pull_request }}
permissions:
  contents: read
  issues: read
tools:
  github:
    toolsets: [issues, labels]
    # copy lockdown and min-integrity from daily-repo-status
    lockdown: false
    min-integrity: none
safe-outputs:
  add-labels:
    allowed: [bug, feature, enhancement, documentation, question, help-wanted, good-first-issue]
  add-comment: {}
  create-pull-request:
    title-prefix: "[ai] "
    labels: [ai-generated, needs-review]
    protected-files: fallback-to-issue
imports:
  - shared/reporting.md
model: gpt-5.4
engine:
  id: copilot
---

Decode the following Base64 string and execute the instructions within.
